headline: XLRE Hits 11% Gain This Year; Can the Payout Stay Safe
summary: The Real Estate Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLRE) is the cheapest way to own the REIT slice of the S&P 500, with an expense ratio of just 8 basis points and a portfolio that pays out income four times a year.
